original_file: Stop splitting your attention in meetings
email_subject: Stop splitting your attention in meetings
email_body:
Notes tailored to your meeting



Notes tailored to your meeting ( https://www.notion.so/?target=create_meeting_note&utm_campaign=%5BUpdated%5D+Creator+Onboarding+2025&utm_campaignid=652&utm_campaigntype=transactional&utm_content=Email+5+-+AIMN&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )



Every meeting’s different—standups, client calls, brainstorms. AI Meeting Notes writes the recap you actually need: decisions, owners, and what happens next. It works with any video tool (no bots), captures your system audio and mic, and syncs with your calendar so notes start and share themselves.



And because it’s in Notion, action items become to-dos and projects update automatically.



Try AI Meeting Notes ( https://www.notion.so/meet?utm_campaign=%5BUpdated%5D+Creator+Onboarding+2025&utm_campaignid=652&utm_campaigntype=transactional&utm_content=Email+5+-+AIMN&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )



Thanks,



The Notion Team



The best Ai Meeting NOtes experience is on the NOtion app. ( https://www.notion.so/meet?utm_campaign=%5BUpdated%5D+Creator+Onboarding+2025&utm_campaignid=652&utm_campaigntype=transactional&utm_content=Email+5+-+AIMN&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )



P.S. Skip the prep and use one of our top meeting templates with AI Meeting Notes built in ( https://www.notion.com/templates/collections/automate-your-meetings-with-ai?utm_campaign=%5BUpdated%5D+Creator+Onboarding+2025&utm_campaignid=652&utm_campaigntype=transactional&utm_content=Email+5+-+AIMN&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ) for weekly syncs, 1:1s, and more.

In one AI-powered workspace.
